task: In @lib/fray/src/fray/v2/ray_backend/backend.py apart from `run_on_pod_ray`, ray remote functions do not include `max_retries` - they should.
user_feedback_text: In @lib/fray/src/fray/v2/ray_backend/backend.py apart from `run_on_pod_ray`, ray remote functions do not include `max_retries` - they should.
